SpTU 1, 014 [Muššu’u 7][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...]

(r 1') $ 1 line traces

[...] x x x [...]
r 2'r 2'

⸢u₃⸣-bi₂-zi ḫul-dub₂ zi an-na ḫe₂-pad₃ zi ⸢ki⸣-[a x x]

(r 2') Be torn out, foe. May you be adjured by the life of heaven, [...] by the life of earth.

na-an-siḫ₂ lem-nu niš ANe lu-u₂ ta-mat niš KIti₃ [...]
(catchline)
r 3'3'

EN₂ šim-mat šim-mat šim-mat ⸢UZU⸣ [...]

(r 3') Incantation: 'Paralysis, paralysis, paralysis of the flesh, [...].'

(colophon)
r 4'4'

IM mBAša₂-a bu₁₂-kur₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—[za-kir]

(r 4') Tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir.

r 5'5'

⸢pa-liḫ⸣ da-nu d50 de₂-a la₃ TUM₃-šu₂ ina me-⸢reš⸣-[ti ...]

(r 5') One who reveres Anu, Ellil and Ea should not take it (the tablet) away. [...] ... intentionally. He should return it. One who takes it away [...].

r 6'6'

[x x] x ⸢ḪE₂.GUR⸣-šu₂ ša₂ ⸢TUM₃⸣-[šu₂ ...]
